description: Ordered membership linking an album to a photo. ATPix-native junction record.

main.description: Junction record for ordered album membership (schema:isPartOf materialized).

photoUri.description: ATPix — child net.atpix.gallery.photo record URI. Use at:// for PDS repo records; use ats:// for permissioned space records (no at-uri format — ats scheme).

position.description: ATPix — sort order within album (0 = first).

addedBy.description: dc:contributor — DID that added this membership.
